extensions.name: Claude
extensions.description: Anthropic's Claude as a model in your NexTerm AI chat. Supports Claude Pro subscription auth (no API key needed) via the Claude Code CLI, or direct API key for pay-per-token.
extensions.longDescription:
Adds Claude (Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5) to NexTerm's AI chat model picker.

Two authentication modes:

• CLI / Subscription mode — uses Claude Code CLI (`npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`) authenticated against your Claude Pro account. No API key, no extra cost beyond your existing Claude Pro subscription. Project-aware: Claude has access to the project you have open in NexTerm.

• API mode — paste an Anthropic API key in Settings → AI to use the pay-per-token API. Lower latency, no CLI dependency.

NexTerm auto-detects which mode is available and uses the most cost-effective one first.
